data.title: Sage Deepens Collaboration with AWS to Fast-Track Agentic AI for Small and Mid-Sized Businesses
data.description: Sage has extended its partnership with AWS to bolster AI-driven financial management, facilitate cloud transitions, and introduce fresh offerings in the AWS Marketplace.

data.title: HII Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Newport News, Virginia, HII (NYSE: HII) revealed that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.38 per share. This dividend is set to be distributed on June 12, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on May 29, 2026.

data.title: CFO Role Expands as Growth, Transformation and AI Agendas Converge, Oliver Wyman Forum and New York Stock Exchange Survey Finds
data.description: In New York, the Oliver Wyman Forum, the think tank of Oliver Wyman, a renowned management consulting firm under Marsh (NYSE: MRSH), has shared results from its first-ever CFO Agenda survey. Developed in partnership with the New York Stock Exchange, the survey gathered insights from close to 500 Chief Financial Officers (CFOs), encompassing about 12% of the worldwide market capitalization. The survey highlights that CFOs are increasingly involved in influencing strategy and allocating capital, showcasing their expanding responsibilities in today's business landscape.

data.title: Hyperfine Swoop® System Introduced as India’s First Portable MRI for Bedside Brain Imaging at the Country’s Leading Medical Institution
data.description: AIIMS in New Delhi has recently started utilizing the Swoop® system for clinical purposes, marking a significant milestone as the first hospital in India to introduce bedside MRI technology.

data.title: Enigma Networks Completes SOC 2 Type I Examination as Enterprises Seek Continuous Governance of Internal Network Trust
data.description: Enigma Networks®, a leader in Zero Trust for Internal Networks (ZTNX), has successfully concluded its SOC 2® Type I examination by an independent third-party audit. The audit confirms that Enigma Networks has integrated security controls and organizational protocols necessary for safeguarding customer data and enterprise environments on a large scale. This achievement underscores the trust enterprise security teams place in Enigma AI.

data.title: New Study Highlights Societal Optimism Toward Breakthrough Science, and Rising Anxiety About How Fast the World Is Changing
data.description: A recent study conducted by Leaps by Bayer and BCG has uncovered diverse trends regarding public perception of groundbreaking science in China, Germany, and the United States. The study compares attitudes towards innovative science in these countries.

data.title: Certifyde Announces $2M Seed Round to Accelerate AI Adoption Across Modern Workforces
data.description: In New York, Certifyde, the AI adoption platform for modern businesses, has recently completed a successful $2 million seed funding round. The funding involved contributions from K5 Global and Flamingo Capital, along with notable investors such as George Ruan (co-founder of Honey), Brad Garlinghouse (CEO of Ripple Labs), Roland Peralta (founder of Nutrafol), and Taylor Fritz (Professional Tennis Player). Additionally, internationally recognized DJ's Diplo and Kygo were among those who participated in the round.

data.title: Sectigo Partners with F5 to Deliver Automated Certificate Lifecycle Management Across F5 ADSP
data.description: Sectigo, a renowned provider of automated Certificate Lifecycle Management and digital certificates, has collaborated with F5 in Scottsdale, Arizona. This partnership aims to improve CLM within the F5 Application Delivery and Security Platform. By automating processes such as issuance, deployment, renewal, and replacement of SSL/TLS certificates, organizations utilizing F5 ADSP can mitigate manual efforts and prevent certificate-related outages. This partnership establishes Sectigo as a key ally in the F5 ADSP Partner Program, offering enhanced efficiency and reliability for SSL/TLS certificates in F5 ADSP environments.

data.title: Ansa Biotechnologies to Showcase Breakthrough DNA Synthesis Technology Backed by Industry’s Only On-Time Guarantee at SynBioBeta 2026 Conference
data.description: Ansa Biotechnologies, based in Emeryville, California, has revealed details about its participation at the SynBioBeta 2026 conference. The company is set to deliver a series of presentations during the event.

data.title: Fed Meeting: Key Questions As Powell Passes Torch To Warsh
data.description: Jerome Powell's future, along with the Federal Reserve's data dependency and balance sheet policy, are undergoing changes. Following the Fed meeting, important questions arise as Powell transitions the leadership to Warsh.

data.title: Quantum Computing Stocks Are Next Big Play After AI, Says Defiance ETF Executive
data.description: A top executive at Defiance ETFs, Sylvia Jablonski, has discussed the significant investment opportunities in quantum computing stocks. According to Jablonski, these stocks are poised to be the next major trend after AI. This information was shared by Investor's Business Daily.
Total CEO: Tanker with company cargo exited the Persian Gulf.

data.title: Why SoFi Stock Is Tumbling Despite Earnings Doubling
data.description: Despite doubling its earnings, Sofi only met Q1 expectations, and the fintech company lowered its guidance for Q2 revenue. As a result, Sofi's stock experienced a significant decline on Wednesday.

data.title: Garmin Beats Q1 Goals But Sticks With Prior Full-Year Outlook
data.description: In the first quarter, Garmin exceeded expectations, but maintained its full-year forecast without any changes. Despite beating the Q1 goals, the company's stock declined following the report.

data.title: Biogen Walloped Wall Street's First Quarter Views; Here's What Happened
data.description: Biogen surpassed Wall Street's projections for the first quarter by a large margin on Wednesday. The company's growth products saw an impressive increase in sales, significantly exceeding expectations. This strong performance was a key factor in Biogen's outstanding financial results for the quarter. The company's achievement has garnered attention from investors and analysts.
